title: COVID-19: Provincial and territorial resources - Canada.ca
content:
## COVID-19: Provincial and territorial resources
Where to get COVID-19 guidance, and testing and self-assessment information specific to your province or territory. You may also use the provided phone numbers to contact your local public health authority.
- COVID-19 info for Albertans
- Alberta COVID-19 testing
- COVID-19 Self-Assessment for Albertans
- Instagram @YourAlberta
- Facebook @YourAlberta.ca
- Twitter @YourAlberta
- Twitter @CMOH_Alberta
- British Columbia COVID-19
- British Columbia COVID-19 Testing
- BC COVID-19 Self-Assessment Tool
- Facebook @ImmunizeBC
- Manitoba COVID-19 Testing
- Manitoba COVID-19 Screening Tool
Phone number : 1-866-626-4862
- YouTube: Manitoba government
- Facebook @manitobagovernment
- New Brunswick Coronavirus
- New Brunswick COVID-19 Testing
- New Brunswick COVID-19 Self-Assessment
- Newfoundland and Labrador COVID-19 information
- Newfoundland and Labrador COVID-19 Testing
- Newfoundland and Labrador COVID Assessment and Referral
Phone number : 811 or 1-888-709-2929

- Northwest Territories coronavirus disease (COVID-19)
- Northwest Territories COVID-19 Testing
- Northwest Territories COVID-19 Self-Assessment
- Nova Scotia: Coronavirus (COVID-19)

- Yukon assess yourself for Coronavirus (COVID-19)
